strategy: Exalted challenge team fight. Hit with Fire (boosted); avoid Ice (80% resist).
Do not cast shields. Universal shields get stolen, and school shields are stolen then destroyed. Rely on direct heals and fast damage.
Avoid Heal-over-time spells and pet HoTs; each triggers a Snow Drift on the target. Use direct heals instead.
Skip DoTs. When his side takes DoT damage he casts Cooldown (a heal) on that ally.
Blade and Feint funneled to the hitter, then burst the 13,850 health.
cheatNotes: Any universal shield you cast gets stolen off the receiver immediately. Do not bother shielding.
School-specific shields are stolen and then destroyed, so they are gone for good. Skip shields entirely.
Heal-over-time spells make him Snow Drift the target. Use direct heals instead.
Pet HoTs trigger the Snow Drift too.
Landing a DoT on his side makes him Cooldown that ally, healing it. Avoid DoTs and hit direct.
